Off Calendar May-12-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Ms. Inshakova, that this matter has been continued many times, that there has been no response to examiner's notes sent several times and that this matter is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)
